headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $20
summary: UBS  analyst Robin Farley   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $18 to $20.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $20
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Grambling   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $18 to $20.
